Care that feels like family.

Dr. Nina Aks has been caring for Germantown families for over a decade. She listens first, explains clearly, and only recommends what you actually need.

Fluent in English and Russian, she serves a diverse community with warmth and patience — building long-term relationships, not one-time transactions.

10+
Years in Practice
180+

Our Services

General Dentistry

Exams, cleanings, fillings, and preventive care for the whole family.

Cosmetic Dentistry

Teeth whitening, veneers, bonding, and full smile makeovers.

Restorative Care

Crowns, bridges, dental implants, and full mouth restoration.

Dental Services

General Dentistry

Exams & Cleanings

Comprehensive evaluations and professional cleanings twice a year.

Digital X-Rays

Low-radiation digital imaging for accurate, fast diagnosis.

Fillings

Tooth-colored composite fillings that blend naturally.

Gum Disease

Scaling, root planing, and ongoing periodontal maintenance.

Children's Care

Gentle, patient-centered care for kids from their first visit.

Night Guards

Custom guards for teeth grinding and TMJ relief.

Cosmetic Dentistry

Teeth Whitening

Professional in-office and take-home whitening.

Porcelain Veneers

Thin porcelain shells that transform shape and color.

Composite Bonding

Quick, affordable reshaping using tooth-colored resin.

Restorative & Advanced

Crowns & Bridges

Durable restorations for damaged or missing teeth.

Dental Implants

Permanent replacement that looks and functions naturally.

Emergency Care

Same-day appointments for pain or broken teeth.

Welcome, New Patients

Here's exactly what to expect so your first visit feels easy and familiar.

1

Request Visit

Fill out our form and we'll confirm within one business day.

2

Digital Forms

Intake forms sent to your email. Fill out easily from home.

3

Appointment

Arrive and be seen on time. We listen to your concerns first.

4

Clear Plan

Leave knowing exactly what was found — with no pressure.

What to Bring

  • Photo ID
  • Insurance card (if applicable)
  • List of current medications
  • Previous records (if available)

Insurance & Payment

We accept most major PPO plans including Delta Dental, Cigna, Aetna, MetLife, Guardian, and United Concordia.

Not sure if we take yours? Call us and we'll verify before your visit — no surprises.

No insurance? We offer transparent self-pay pricing.
